content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1601: Survival of the fittest

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

Hitesh_

Although Zi Yao and Shi Yan left that area, this isolated void still had other bloody fights happening in it.

At the location of the Water Power Upanishad Origin, Emperor Sea Shark was fusing with the crystal water drop. He had released his Soul Consciousness to try and merge with the Water Power Upanishad Origin. The murmuring sounds of the water inside that transparent water drop were pleasant to the ears.

If no one came to disturb him, Emperor Sea Shark would have a smooth progress, and he could make the Water Power Upanishad Origin the topmost Power Upanishad in his soul altar.

But, things would never turn as one wished...

After Yuan parted with Serene Prison and Rupert, he flew away in his human form, trying to search for the Water Power Upanishad Origin, and finally sensed its energy fluctuations one day.

Yuan immediately left everything aside to focus and use all of his power to find the water drop created by Water Power Upanishad Origin.

When he arrived, he realized that Emperor Sea Shark was there already, and the other had entered the Water Power Upanishad Origin already.

Yuan Zu’s face was sinister, his eyes cold and ruthless. “Just a little warrior...Dare to vie for the Power Upanishad Origin with me! You don’t want your life!”

While talking, clear water energy fluctuated from Yuan Zu’s body.

His human body slowly changed into his real form, but it was thousands of time smaller. His acupuncture points released massive water balls, each of them fulgent and containing an entire immense sea. Shortly, the splashing sounds of water waves arose as Yuan Zu was covered inside a big water ball.

He turned into a massive, transparent water ball. With the power of water, he slowly bobbed toward the Water Power Upanishad Origin.

Just like Devour, at the moment Yuan was born, he got the seal of Water Power Upanishad imprinted in his soul. It wasn’t wrong to say that he was a life that ascended from the water essence between the heaven and earth. He was the ancestor and the old sage of all Water Power Upanishads. Since the Absolute Beginning Era, he had never cultivated any other power.

He had dedicated his entire life to the Water Power Upanishad.

His body was now a water ball with the supple power of water twirling around. As soon as he got into the Water Power Upanishad Origin, it was like a drop of water entering the sea, without causing a single ripple. Instantly, he had gotten into the Water Power Upanishad Origin.

In the immense world of water, Yuan felt the thickest steam he had ever perceived. He felt as if he had returned to the state of puzzled consciousness before he was born...

At the same time, even though Emperor Sea Shark had gotten here earlier than Yuan, his body and blood couldn’t be compared to Yuan’s. As soon as Yuan got in, the strange power of the Water Power Upanishad Origin seemed to recognize a more suitable master. Unexpectedly, it ignored Emperor Sea Shark and came to Yuan.

Yuan’s soul energy filled the Water Power Upanishad Origin. His terrifying Soul Consciousness eventually connected with the Power Upanishad Origin and spotted Emperor Sea Shark, immediately launching an attack!

Emperor Sea Shark was wounded severely in just a blink!

No matter it was realm, power, age, level of power Upanishad, or power of bloodline, Emperor Sea Shark couldn’t compare with Yuan. As the two of them appeared at the same time in the Water Power Upanishad Origin, it seemed to have its own consciousness. It decided to choose Yuan, which spelled tragedy for Emperor Sea Shark!

...

On the other side, after Desolate had killed Hiro and gotten the Metal Power Upanishad Origin, his power had increased sharply. He continued to move, not lingering there any longer.

He moved to a place nearby without spending a lot of time checking the route. It was a flatland covered with thick dust and soil. The power of the great earth was emitted from it, covering the entire world.

After Desolate came here, he wore a calm face but his eyes were bright. “The Earth Power Upanishad Origin of the Five Elements...This place’s the essence of earth. I will take this as the second Power Upanishad Origin...”

Swoosh! Swoosh!

Thick dust twirled, creating a natural cage and covering the flatland that ordinary souls or eyes couldn’t see through.

Desolate now looked different.

Although he had just taken in the Metal Power Upanishad Origin not long ago, after a moment of staying here, his aura had already changed. Layers of dust diffused from him; shortly, he became like that flatland, dust and ashes covering his body along with the simple but heavy energy of earth.

His eyes pierced through the thick layer of dust to observe the flatland.

The gray-brown flatland didn’t have a tuft of grass; dust and sand covered the entire land under the immense sky. The soul auras were reported to Desolate from two corners of the flatland...

Desolate checked carefully and roared like a dragon next while disappearing. In the next moment, the flatland of the Earth Power Upanishad Origin shook hard. It seemed like there was a dragon sleeping underground that had just been awakened, and it wanted to destroy everything hindering it.

In two different corners of the flatland stayed two aliens who had followed Sauron here. They looked as though they were made of sand and gravel, their skin of the same tone as the gray-brown flatland.

They were the two members of the Prosperous Earth Tribe at the First Sky of TA, cultivating the Earth power Upanishad.

The Prosperous Earth Tribe was similar to the Snow Tribe: all of their members cultivated only one Power Upanishad. It was in their fate since they were born. The members of the Prosperous Earth Tribe had absorbed the power of earth since they were in their mothers’ wombs. When they were born, they had already had the Earth Power Upanishad.

On Empty Land and the vast sea of stars, the Prosperous Earth Tribe was the “Son of Earth” because they could move underground freely using the power of the great earth.

These two members of the Prosperous Earth Tribe had undergone so many difficulties to get here to obtain the Earth Power Upanishad Origin. However, they didn’t have good luck as they encountered Desolate here...

Seeing the terrifying commotion deep in the ground of the flatland, they discolored in fright, but didn’t have a clue...

While they were frightened, a wave of fierce energy arose from deep underground. The earth caved in furiously while two dragons roared and soared up. The dragons opened their mouths and swallowed the two in one attempt. Afterward, they returned to the ground through the cracks they had created, disappearing shortly.

Not long after that, as the two members of the Prosperous Earth Tribe were buried, the earthquake subsided.

Deep underground, Desolate was quietly urging his power to take the Earth Power Upanishad Origin.

...

Rupert, Serene Prison, Edgar, Zhen Ru, and Fan Dei Lei parted after they arrived in this area. When they bumped into the others, they were ready to fight.

Each of the Power Upanishad Origins was unique, and all the warriors in this place were trying their best to search for them. Whenever they found a suitable Power Upanishad Origin, they would observe first, because someone with the same power Upanishad could have had come before them.

No one could take it at ease.

Bloody battles happened regularly. To become the only one that possessed the Power Upanishad Origin, the principle of the Power Upanishad, they had to risk their lives to kill any rival.

Battles like that happened in every area which had a Power Upanishad Origin. They were fighting due to their greed the ultimate power Upanishad to death!

...

Parting from Zi Yao, Shi Yan left his clone, returning to the sea of life of the Life Power Upanishad Origin.

He had the method to get the Power Upanishad Origin. He believed that he could fuse with the sea of life this time to attain the ultimate supernatural powers of this power Upanishad.

As he was dashing fast, the Skyfall Star River suddenly sent him a magical vibe. He suddenly stopped, using his soul to feel and observe. After a while, his eyes brightened.

He then changed his direction abruptly.

After a long journey, he reached a brilliant, immense sea of stars. This place had the most sparkling stars seeming like the purest jade. All souls would be touched by watching this sight.

The Skyfall Star River shook hard as soon as Shi Yan got here and immediately turned into a chain of stars, emerging in front of him.

In his eyes, the suns, the moons, and the stars changed, making his eyes seem like they held two bright seas of stars.

Sensing the Star Power Upanishad Origin in that magnificent and yet mysterious sea of stars, Shi Yan felt his soul sinking as he was walking toward the area.

As soon as he was about to get there, a magical but powerful energy emitted from that beautiful galaxy

Sizzle! Sizzle!

His body sizzled as if it was burning, his soul turning hot. As he was frightened, he got it all of a sudden.

Shi Yan halted. He knew he had more than one Power Upanishad in his real body, which was the reason why he couldn’t enter the Star Power Upanishad Origin yet. He needed to make a clone and extract his Star power Upanishad, imprinting it into that clone to get into the mysterious sea of stars. That was how he could get the Power Upanishad Origin.

As soon as he was about to split his body, power Upanishads, and soul, he spotted a familiar soul energy fluctuation.

Shi Yan was surprised. Pondering for a while, he shouted all of a sudden, “Fan De Lei!”

As they both cultivated Star power Upanishad, the resentment between Shi Yan and Fan De Lei was deep enough. He didn’t expect that the other would come to this place and find the Star Power Upanishad Origin before him!

“Congregate!”

Countless stars flew out of his body, bringing his blood to congregate in front of him. Slowly, they became a clone which looked as though it was made up of broken asteroids.

In the next moment, he extracted a wisp of his soul, as well as a part of his Sea of Consciousness and soul pond, and sent them to the clone’s head.

Shortly after, the clone had become a warrior cultivating Star power Upanishad, with starlight fall from his body. All of a sudden, he sank into that galaxy with a pair of star-like eyes.

Swish!

The Skyfall Star River became a jet of light, following the clone to the sea of stars.

As soon as he got in, Fan De Lei’s aura became clear. He navigated, then laughed. “Fan De Lei! You don’t have good luck!”

Deep in the sea of stars, a light dot slowly twisted, turning into Fan De Lei’s shape.

As soon as Shi Yan’s clone entered the galaxy, Fan De Lei felt him. Hearing Shi Yan’s laughter, Fan De Lei was upset as he screamed indignantly with a pale face, “Shi Yan! You’re such an everlasting ghost! Why do I meet you everywhere?”

“Behave and get lost! For you being a member of the Phantom Clan, I won’t kill you,” Shi Yan shouted coldly.
